entity.name: Alternative Asset Literacy
entity.disclaimer: Educational content only. Not financial advice.
entity.description: A woman-founded, research-backed mobile education platform at the intersection of alternative investing, behavioral economics, and values-aligned finance. Created by Victoria Lee Case. Designed for high-net-worth women investors, female entrepreneurs, climate-conscious investors, DeFi and crypto investors, and the wealth management firms that serve them.

target_audiences: Women's wealth management clients (UBS Women's Wealth, Morgan Stanley, RBC)
Art collectors and art banking clients

courses.title: Investing Primer
courses.description: A foundational primer on investing — building the vocabulary and frameworks for modern investment literacy.

courses.title: Alternative Investing
courses.description: An introduction to alternative asset classes — private equity, real estate, collectibles, commodities, and beyond.

courses.title: Behavioral Economics
courses.description: Explore cognitive biases, emotional decision-making, and the psychology behind investment choices.
courses.first_section: Navigating the Brain: The Intersection to Finances_

courses.title: Gender and Behavioral Investing
courses.description: Examining the intersection of gender, behavioral economics, and investment patterns.
sample_sections: Align your Investments with your Purpose_

courses.title: Decentralized Finance
courses.description: Understanding DeFi, blockchain technology, stablecoins, and the future of decentralized financial systems.
courses.critical_insight: The building of DeFi without representation is the next great wealth gap.

courses.title: Art as Investment
courses.description: The art market, art as an alternative asset class, valuation, collection strategies, and the intersection of culture and capital.

courses.title: Bonus: Kahlo × Basquiat — Art & Identity
courses.description: Accidental Bedfellows — exploring two of the world's greatest artists through the lens of trauma, healing, and artistic expression. Examines minority representation in Blue-Chip art markets.

courses.title: Climate, Energy & Real World Assets
courses.description: Explore the intersection of sustainable investing, climate finance, and tokenized real-world assets. From ESG fundamentals to green bonds, carbon credits, and RWA innovations.

courses.title: DeFi Investing
courses.description: From Speculation to Infrastructure — a practical guide to protocol-level investing in the modern crypto landscape. Covers stablecoins, yield farming, liquidity provision, and risk management.
courses.first_section: 1. The Retail Reality: Speculation vs. Investment_

courses.title: High-Risk DeFi Strategies
courses.description: Advanced DeFi strategies beyond the core curriculum — leverage, derivatives, cross-chain strategies, and risk management for active DeFi participants.

courses.title: Advanced Portfolio ESG Construction
courses.description: Building an ESG-integrated alternative portfolio. Asset allocation across green bonds, carbon credits, ESG equity funds, and tokenized real-world assets.

courses.title: Questions for Your Financial Advisor — ESG
courses.description: 12 advisor Q&As to evaluate whether a financial advisor understands ESG investing — with competency scoring and 'Why This Matters' context reveals.

courses.title: Evaluating Your Financial Advisor's Crypto Knowledge
courses.description: 14 advisor Q&As to determine if a financial advisor is prepared to discuss digital assets — with competency scoring and 'Why This Matters' context reveals.

category_breakdown.source: Museum of Modern Art + art market mechanics

category_breakdown.topics: blockchain, stablecoins, yield farming, DAOs, CBDCs, DApps, RWA tokenization, ZKPs
private equity, fractional ownership, art funds, family offices, carried interest, J-curve
green bonds, carbon credits, SBTi, just transition, CBAM, blended finance
loss aversion, anchoring, FOMO, prospect theory, nudge, framing effect
gender bonds, 2X Challenge, WEPs, gender-smart investing, care economy

terms.description: Searchable glossary of 351 terms across 6 categories and 8 databases. Alphabetical navigation with category filtering.

toolkit.name: Investor's Toolkit
toolkit.description: Essential resources, checklists, and guidance for all alternative investments.

tools.name: Price & Market Databases
tools.description: Essential resources for market research across asset classes

tools.name: Asset Research Framework
tools.description: How to research any alternative asset before investing

tools.name: Universal Due Diligence Checklist
tools.description: Essential questions before any alternative investment

brain_and_investing.name: Brain & Investing
brain_and_investing.description: Your Investor Brain — an interactive brain map showing how neurological regions drive investment decisions and how to stay in control.

regions.name: Amygdala
regions.role: The panic button — activates during crashes and volatility, flooding you with urgency to act NOW

regions.name: Nucleus Accumbens
regions.role: Reward processing — drives excitement around potential gains

regions.name: Anterior Insula
regions.role: Risk and loss detection — registers anticipated pain of loss

interactive_learning.name: What Would You Do?
interactive_learning.description: Interactive scenarios to understand your behavioral patterns in investing.

research_footnotes.name: Research Footnotes
research_footnotes.description: All sources and citations referenced across modules.

sample_sources.title: Alternative Investments 2020: The Future of Alternative Investments
How to Analyze a Real Estate Investment
sample_sources.author: Catherine Cote

partnership_opportunities.value_proposition: Branded client education that reduces onboarding friction, deepens advisory relationships, and attracts next-generation and women investors.
